title: Casino Rocket
description: Slot machines, Blackjack, Gacha Machines and more to Cobblemon!
body:
# Casino Rocket

![Casino Rocket Mod Official Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcad904675097fc2af495b3babfd1677ba451681.png)

Casino Rocket is a Fabric mod for Minecraft that introduces a fully featured in-game casino ecosystem, including multiple casino games, an integrated economy system, administrative tools, and highly customizable configuration files.

### ⚠️ Disclaimer
> Casino Rocket is a purely fictional mod.
> It does not involve real money or real gambling.
> All gameplay is for entertainment purposes only.
> You can freely use my mod on servers, as long as it is free and not behind a paywall or with P2W mechanics.

## 🕹️ Available Games
### 🎰 Slot Machines
- Configurable probabilities
- Customizable bet values
- Multipliers and custom symbols
### 🃏 Blackjack Table
- Classic blackjack gameplay
- Fully integrated with the casino economy
### 🎁 Gacha Machines
- Fully customizable pools
- Weighted probability system
- Support for pity systems and premier bonuses

## 💰 Economy System
**💵 Full bill system**

**👛 Integrated wallet**

**🔗 Direct integration with CobbleDollars**

**🎟️ Casino items:**
- Chips for machines
- Coins for gacha
- Casino-themed Music Discs

## 🧸 Additional Content
**🧱 Decorative blocks**
- Gold variants
- Diamond variants
> Designed for building casinos, VIP areas, and themed rooms

## 🛠️ Commands
**🎮 Player Commands**
- View gachapon rates and probabilities
```
/casinorocket gachapon <item/pokemon/plushies> <pool>
/casinorocket gachapon <machine> <base/pity> <player> <coin>
```
- Check personal gacha statistics
```
/casinorocket stats <player>
```
- Access casino leaderboards
```
/casinorocket <gachapon/slots/blackjack> leaderboard <argument>
```

**👤 Administrative Commands**
- Spawn casino villagers
```
/casinorocket villager spawn <name>
```
- Edit villager data and behavior
```
/casinorocket villager <setsuit/setai/lookplayer/lookdirection>
```

## ⚙️ Config Files
Casino Rocket generates JSON configuration files that allow full control over casino behavior:
- Editable chip prices
- Configurable gacha machine rates, pity systems, and premier bonuses
- Fully customizable gachapon pools
- Customizable slot machine bet values and probabilities
> 📁 Configuration files are generated automatically on first launch in config/casinorocket/

## 📦 Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.1
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Coth Config (15.0.140)
- Cobblemon (>=1.6.1) *Version 1.7.0 and 1.7.1 should work*
- CobbleDollars (>=2.0.0+Beta5.1) 

## 📋 Suggestions
> This mod was made for a Cobbleverse Modpack Minecraft Server w/ friends, so the gachapon pools and casino stores adds items from mods present in that modpack.
- CobbleCuisine
- Cobblemon: Mega Showdown
- Addons that add Pokémon not yet available in Cobblemon

Ty! Enjoy the mod.
